word: G2292 - θαῤῥέω - tharrhéō - thar-hreh'-o - Be bold

sections.paragraph:
- Original: θαῤῥέω

- Transliteration: Tharrheo

- Phonetic: thar-hreh'-o

- Definition:

1. to be of good courage, be of good cheer

2. to be bold

- Origin: another form for G2293

- TDNT entry: 03:25,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Another form for G2293; to exercise courage: - be bold X boldly have confidence be confident. Compare G5111.
